WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
percentage_increase AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013) AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_by_segment
)
SELECT 'Max Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Min Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase);

WITH annual_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        ym.CustomerID,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c 
        ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM annual_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_sme_lam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_lam_kam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_kam_sme
FROM min_consumption_per_segment;

SELECT

    SELECT

         FROM results r1
         JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
         WHERE ra1.year = 2008 
           AND ra1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r1.position = 1
           AND r1.time IS NOT NULL
        ) AS champion_time,
        
        -- Last finisher's time in milliseconds
        (SELECT r2.milliseconds
         FROM results r2
         JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
         WHERE ra2.year = 2008 
           AND ra2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000.0)
    ) AS avg_champion_time_seconds
FROM races r
JOIN (
    -- Get last race per year before 1975
    SELECT year, MAX(round) AS final_round
    FROM races
    WHERE year < 1975
    GROUP BY year
) final_race
    ON r.year = final_race.year AND r.round = final_race.final_round
JOIN driverStandings ds
    ON ds.raceId = r.raceId AND ds.position = 1
JOIN results res
    ON res.raceId = r.raceId AND res.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

    lt.time AS lap_time,
    r.year,
    r.round
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN (
    SELECT c.circuitId, MIN(lt.milliseconds) AS min_ms
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
    GROUP BY c.circuitId

WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY c.name;

    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM female_max_salary) - (SELECT min_avg_salary FROM lowest_salary_oldest) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_females ofe
JOIN lowest_salary_oldest lso ON ofe.A11 = lso.min_avg_salary
JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id = ofe.client_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = dp.account_id;

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM card ca
JOIN disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';
95:
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE dist.A11 = (
    SELECT MAX(A11)
    FROM district
)
AND c.birth_date = (
    SELECT MAX(c2.birth_date)
    FROM client c2
    JOIN district dist2 ON c2.district_id = dist2.district_id
    WHERE dist2.A11 = (
        SELECT MAX(A11)
        FROM district
    )
);

SELECT 
    l.account_id,
    COUNT(*) AS loan_count
FROM loan l
JOIN account a 
    ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
  AND l.amount >= 250000
  AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'
  AND l.status = 'A'
GROUP BY l.account_id;

    ON c.uuid = l.uuid

FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT l.loan_id, l.amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id

      AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id

SELECT DISTINCT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D';
116:
WITH first_client AS (
    SELECT l.account_id
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1998,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1993
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_client fc ON t.account_id = fc.account_id
)
SELECT 
    ((balance_1998 - balance_1993) * 1.0 / balance_1993) * 100 AS increase_rate_percent
FROM balances;
152:
SELECT AVG(d.A15) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
WHERE d.district_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.district_id
    FROM account a
    JOIN district dd ON a.district_id = dd.district_id
    WHERE dd.A15 > 4000
      AND a.date >= '1997-01-01'
);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dis ON c.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (
      SELECT MIN(birth_date)
      FROM client
      WHERE gender = 'F'
  )
  AND dis.A11 = (
      SELECT MIN(dis2.A11)
      FROM client c2
      JOIN district dis2 ON c2.district_id = dis2.district_id
      WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
        AND c2.birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
  );

    t.date,
    t.amount,
    t.balance,
    t.operation
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id

145:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
  AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
  AND t.date >= '1998-01-01' AND t.date < '1999-01-01'
  AND t.amount < (
        SELECT AVG(t2.amount)
        FROM trans t2
        WHERE t2.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
          AND t2.date >= '1998-01-01' AND t2.date < '1999-01-01'
    );
